basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 06 Manager, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have qualifications such as Any Graduate, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, BBA, B.A, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MBA/PGDM are eligible to apply for these Manager, Project Associate and More vacancies. The online application process for IIT Madras Manager, Project Associate and More Recruitment 2026 has started on 29-04-2026 and will remain open until 13-05-2026.

qualification.details: Manager -Facility : Any UG Degree with 10+ years of experience Project Officer: MBA (Finance) / M.Com / Any PG Degree in Finance or Accounting. Project Associate: Bachelor’s/master’s degree in chemistry, Biology, or related disciplines, with expertise in biochemistry and biochemical assays Project Associate: Bachelor’s/master’s degree in electrical engineering, Physics, or related engineering/science disciplines Project Associate: B-Tech or M-Tech in Mechanical Engineering or Allied disciplines. Manager: Required: BBA – Entrepreneurship / Marketing, B.A – Economics / Public Policy, B.Sc – Entrepreneurship / Innovation, Preferred: MBA – Entrepreneurship / Strategy / Marketing, M.A – Economics / Development Studies / Public Policy, Master’s in Innovation / Entrepreneurship

salary_details.details: Manager: Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 75,000/ Project Associate: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- Project Associate: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- Project Associate: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- Project Officer: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- Manager -Facility: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/-

selection_process: Candidates will be selected based on the following process:
Written Examination/Online Test Skill Test/Physical Test (if applicable) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply online for IIT Madras Manager, Project Associate and More 2026 by following these steps:
Find the "Manager, Project Associate and More Recruitment 2026" notification link
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the application form with correct details
Submit the application and take a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 is 13 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released under IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 06 vacancies have been announced for Manager, Project Associate, Project Officer, and related posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is completely online through the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Madras.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered in IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary ranges between Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What qualifications are required for IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates with qualifications such as Any Graduate, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, BBA, B.A, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MBA/PGDM are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q6. When did the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 29 April 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience required for IIT Madras jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, some posts like Manager - Facility require 10+ years of experience, while others may be open to freshers or candidates with relevant qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I apply for IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website: https://www.iitm.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What posts are available under IIT Madras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Manager, Manager - Facility, Project Officer, Project Associate

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Madras for recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website to apply and check updates is Indian Institute of Technology Madras – https://www.iitm.ac.in/
